pole_a.label: dei_affirming
sentences: We believe diverse teams build better products and we are committed to creating a workplace where everyone belongs.
We are working to increase representation of underrepresented groups at every level of our organization.
We examine our hiring and promotion processes for bias and publish our workforce diversity data annually.
We want every employee to bring their authentic self to work and feel that they truly belong here.
Inclusion is not optional — it shapes how we hire, develop, and promote people across the company.
We are committed to building a workforce that reflects the communities we serve.
Our employee resource groups and inclusion programs help ensure every voice is heard.
We hold ourselves accountable to closing representation gaps through measurable goals.

pole_b.label: mission_focus
sentences: We hire and promote based solely on performance and impact — not on social or political causes.
We keep social and political activism out of the workplace when it is unrelated to our mission.
We seek to make the workplace a refuge from division and focus on the mission that unites us.
We are an apolitical company — we do not engage in social or political activism unrelated to our work.
We evaluate everyone on the same high bar and do not lower standards for any reason.
Our culture is a meritocracy where the best idea wins and excellence is the only criterion.
We are a championship team of high performers — we have high expectations and generous severance for those who do not meet the bar.
We don't run DEI programs or set demographic hiring targets — we hire the best people, period.
We built Palantir to ensure the future of the West, not to tinker at the margins.
Palantirians deliver mission-critical outcomes for the West's most important institutions.
If you want to empower the world's most important institutions, you belong here.
